_comment_1: Copy this file to listener_config.json and fill in api_id + api_hash.
_comment_2: Get api_id (int) and api_hash (str) from https://my.telegram.org -> API Development Tools.
_comment_3: Leave channel_id null on first run, then `python telegram_listener.py list-chats` to find the right id and paste it here.
_comment_4: channel_title_pattern is the fallback when channel_id is null -- the listener matches the first chat title containing this substring (case-insensitive).
